description: The UserInspectorItem component is used to display user items of the User Inspector.

fields._user: The user this item points to.
fields._userNameText: The text field to display the user's name.
fields._expander: The component used to expand items under the user like stream groups.
fields._expanderIndicator: The indicator component used to show the expand/collapse arrow.
fields._childContainer: The slot to display child items of this user item.

methods.OpenUser: Is called when the user is opened by a user.
methods.OpenComponents: Is called when the user components are opened up.
methods.OpenStream: Is called when a specific stream on a user is opened up.
